assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a machine that can install Shopify CLI.
No Partner or merchant developer account, Dev Dashboard app, or local app repository exists yet.
The intended family is an embedded admin app rather than a pure API-credential integration.

developer_goal: Create the required Shopify developer identity and dev store, scaffold the recommended React Router app, install it on the dev store, and exercise the starter home action.

first_success.outcome: The scaffolded app is installed on a dev store and the developer reaches the documented Generate a product action.
first_success.observable_signal: Scaffold tutorial ends at Generate a product; it does not document a post-click product object or toast confirmation.

route_selection.surface: Shopify CLI plus Dev Dashboard / Partner developer account and scaffold-app tutorial
route_selection.rule: Prefer the documented React Router scaffold when building an admin app. Account-creation prerequisites must be included from a cold start.

candidates.name: Partner account plus CLI React Router scaffold and Generate a product
candidates.reason: Matches the recommended scaffold path, but Partner versus merchant-with-permissions account creation is not fully field-documented.

candidates.name: Merchant store owner with app development permissions plus same scaffold
candidates.reason: CLI login docs accept Partner or merchant accounts; entitlement and store-creation steps differ.

candidates.name: Extension-only template or Dev Dashboard API-credential-only app
candidates.reason: Official scaffold page presents these as alternate goals with different first-success signals.

required_path.action: Create a Shopify Partner account or a merchant account with app development permissions, then create a dev store.

required_fields.label: Developer account signup fields
required_fields.notes: Scaffold requirements assume an existing user with permissions and a created dev store; signup field inventory is not on the scaffold page.

required_fields.label: Dev store name and plan selection

required_path.observable_result: The developer can log in with Shopify CLI and select a owned or staff-accessible dev store.

required_path.action: Run shopify app init, enter an app name, and select Build a React Router app.

required_fields.label: Template selection
required_fields.notes: React Router is the documented recommended path for most apps.

required_path.observable_result: A local app directory is created with Shopify CLI dependencies installed.

required_path.action: Run shopify app dev and complete CLI login plus Dev Dashboard app connection prompts.

required_fields.label: Developer account authorization for Shopify CLI

required_path.observable_result: Local server runs with a tunnel and a connected Dev Dashboard app.

required_path.action: Press p to open the preview URL and install the app on the selected dev store.
required_path.observable_result: The app is installed and its home page is available in Shopify admin.

required_path.action: From the app home page, select Generate a product.
required_path.observable_result: The Generate a product control is exercised; exact success UI or product state is not documented.

prerequisites.description: Latest Shopify CLI and a current Chrome or Firefox browser are required.
Dev store use with CLI requires store owner or staff access.

external_gates.description: App development permissions and an existing or newly created dev store gate the scaffold tutorial before CLI init.

platform_outcomes.description: shopify app dev creates or connects a Dev Dashboard app, Prisma SQLite database, and Cloudflare tunnel.

excluded.item: Build a Shopify app using React Router feature tutorial beyond Generate a product
excluded.reason: That tutorial extends the scaffold after the scaffold page's terminal learning task.

excluded.item: App distribution, billing, and production hosting
excluded.reason: Documented as later launch work after local install success.

sources.title: Scaffold an app
evidence_supported: shopify app init React Router path
Install app and Generate a product

sources.title: Build a Shopify app using React Router
Development stores
evidence_supported: Create store name and plan steps

uncertainties.question: Which account surface is canonical from a cold start: Partner signup or merchant store with developer permissions?
uncertainties.impact: Signup fields, org structure, and when the first dev store is created all change.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human selection of one account type plus a fresh signup and store-creation walkthrough.

uncertainties.question: What observable UI confirms Generate a product succeeded?
uncertainties.impact: The scaffold tutorial instructs the click but does not document a toast, product title, or recovery path.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Observed admin UI after Generate a product, or clearer official success criteria.

uncertainties.question: Should extension-only or Dev Dashboard credential-only apps compete as equal shortest first-success routes?
uncertainties.impact: Those paths omit React Router scaffold and Generate a product entirely.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Corpus policy fixing the Shopify developer goal to admin-app scaffold versus API credentials.
